payload.answer: I can inspect an entity only if it resolves to a stored record. "Sam from Goldman" is ambiguous as written and could be a descriptive mention rather than a canonical entity. No current entity can be safely returned from the provided input alone.

entity_resolution.reason: No resolvable entity record was provided for the query string "Sam from Goldman". The phrase may be a descriptive alias rather than a canonical entity name, so resolving it without supporting memory would risk conflating identities.

details: Parsed command as an entity inspection request.
Did not fabricate or infer a durable entity from an ambiguous descriptive string.
Returned no memory cards because no safe resolution was available.

repair_options: Try the canonical name if known, e.g. /brain inspect entity "Sam <LastName>"
Search by organization separately, e.g. inspect entities related to Goldman
List candidate entities matching "Sam" before inspecting one specific record
If punctuation/quoting was accidental, retry with the exact stored entity label
